assertions.title: Loading Screen Uses wzrdtechlogo.png with Orange Theme

steps.observed: Logo src is '/lovable-uploads/wzrdtechlogo.png', centered with z-10 relative positioning

steps.action: Check for orange/amber animations in LoadingScreen.tsx
steps.expected: Orange/amber glow, rings, particles, progress bar
steps.observed: Radial glow hsla(14,100%,64%), rings border-orange-500/20 and border-amber-500/15, particles bg-orange-500/30, conic-gradient with #f97316 and #f59e0b, progress bar with linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #f59e0b)
No matches found — zero green/emerald references
LoadingScreen isLoading={isLoading} rendered in App component, visible for ~2s on initial load

evidence.consoleErrors: none (loading screen dismissed before browser connected)
evidence.notes: Loading screen appears for ~2s on page load and auto-dismisses. Verified through source code inspection since it completes before agent-browser can capture it. All colors confirmed orange/amber only.

steps.action: Inspect progress bar implementation in LoadingScreen.tsx
steps.expected: Progress bar animates 0-100% over ~2s with orange-to-amber gradient
steps.observed: Bottom progress bar uses scaleX animation from 0 to 1 over duration: 2s with ease [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]. Style: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #f59e0b) — orange (#f97316) to amber (#f59e0b). Height: 3px, positioned absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0.

steps.action: Verify timing matches App.tsx loading duration
steps.expected: Animation duration matches loading screen display time
steps.observed: App.tsx sets isLoading=false after 2000ms timeout, progress bar animation duration is 2s — perfectly synchronized

evidence.notes: Progress bar verified via source code. The scaleX animation with transformOrigin: 'left' creates a left-to-right fill effect from 0% to 100% width.

assertions.title: Fullscreen Background Video on Landing Page

steps.observed: Landing page loaded successfully

steps.expected: Video element with bgvid.mp4 src, autoplay, loop, muted, playsInline
steps.observed: Video found: src='http://localhost:8080/bgvid.mp4', autoplay=true, loop=true, muted=true, playsInline=true, readyState=4 (HAVE_ENOUGH_DATA), paused=false
Video classes: 'absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover', parent: 'fixed inset-0 z-0' — fills entire viewport
File exists: 1,872,572 bytes (1.8MB)

steps.action: Take screenshot of landing page with video background
steps.observed: All text clearly legible — white text on dark overlay
Overlay gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 30%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 100%)
White on dark: 17.40:1, text-white/60 on dark: 6.11:1, orange on dark: 6.21:1 — all exceed WCAG AA requirements

steps.action: Inspect VideoBackground.tsx source for error handling
steps.observed: hasVideoError state tracks errors via 'error' event listener. When error occurs, video element is removed from DOM (!hasVideoError && <video>). Dark gradient fallback div is always present underneath.

steps.action: Simulate video error via browser console
steps.expected: Fallback background shown, no blank space
steps.observed: After dispatching error event, video element removed from DOM (videoExists=false). Dark gradient fallback visible: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0a 0%, #111111 25%, #0d0d0d 50%, #141414 75%, #0a0a0a 100%)
All content remains visible and readable on dark gradient background

steps.action: Take screenshots of landing page sections
steps.expected: Card-based layout, dark theme, orange accents, generous whitespace
steps.observed: Card-based layout confirmed: sections use rounded-2xl borders, bg-white/[0.02] backgrounds, backdrop-blur-sm. Dark theme with black/near-black backgrounds throughout.
CTA buttons use gradient from-[#FF6B4A] to-[#e55a3a], badges use orange-500/10 backgrounds, section dividers use orange-500/20 gradients
Hero text: text-5xl to text-8xl font-bold tracking-tight. Sections have py-20 px-4 spacing. Subtle noise texture overlay for depth.

steps.action: Enumerate all sections in DOM via JavaScript
steps.observed: All 10 sections render in order: (0) MogPromoSection, (1) HeroSection, (2) Trust Indicators, (3) FeatureGrid, (4) UseCasesSection, (5) TestimonialsSection, (6) NewReleasePromo, (7) PricingSectionRedesigned, (8) FAQAccordion, (9) StickyFooter
Full-page screenshot captured showing all sections rendered
Only 2 Framer Motion warnings about controls.start() — these are non-blocking informational warnings, not errors

evidence.consoleErrors: 2 Framer Motion warnings (controls.start() before mount) — non-blocking, informational only

assertions.title: Landing Page CTA Buttons Route Correctly

steps.observed: href='/login?mode=signup' confirmed via DOM inspection and get attr
Navigated to /home (auto-redirect because auth bypass makes user authenticated — login page redirects authenticated users to dashboard)
Navigated to http://localhost:8080/home — confirmed

steps.action: Verify 'Log In' href in source code (unauth state)
steps.observed: Source code confirms: <Link to='/login'>Log In</Link> rendered when user is null

evidence.notes: All 3 CTA routes verified. 'Log In' → /login verified via source code (unavailable in UI due to auth bypass). 'Start Creating Free' → /login?mode=signup verified via href attribute. 'Dashboard' → /home verified via click test.

steps.observed: Header displays: Logo, Features, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Demo, Dashboard (link to /home), Log Out (button with handleLogout)

steps.action: Verify unauthenticated header in source code
steps.observed: Landing.tsx uses {user ? (Dashboard + Log Out) : (Log In + Sign Up)} conditional rendering. Unauth state: Log In (link to /login), Sign Up (link to /login?mode=signup). Both desktop and mobile headers have this conditional.
Annotated screenshot shows: @e3 link 'Dashboard', @e4 button 'Log Out'

evidence.notes: Cannot test unauthenticated state via browser because VITE_BYPASS_AUTH_FOR_TESTS=true forces authenticated state. Source code review confirms both auth states are properly handled with conditional rendering.

frictions.description: Loading screen (VAL-LAND-007/008) appears for only ~2s on page load and auto-dismisses before agent-browser can capture screenshots. Had to verify via source code inspection instead of visual testing.
frictions.resolution: Used source code inspection of LoadingScreen.tsx and App.tsx to verify logo, colors, and animation details. All orange/amber colors and wzrdtechlogo.png confirmed.

frictions.description: Auth bypass (VITE_BYPASS_AUTH_FOR_TESTS=true) prevents testing unauthenticated header state in browser. Can only verify authenticated state visually.
frictions.resolution: Verified unauthenticated rendering path via source code review of Landing.tsx conditional {user ? auth : unauth} rendering.

frictions.description: Framer Motion warnings in console: 'controls.start() should only be called after a component has mounted' (2 occurrences). These are non-blocking informational warnings.
frictions.resolution: Not a bug — Framer Motion animation timing warning. Does not affect functionality.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 9 passed, 0 failed. All landing page content assertions verified. Video background has correct attributes (autoplay, loop, muted, playsInline), dark overlay provides WCAG-compliant contrast (6.11:1 minimum), video fallback works correctly, card-based layout with orange/amber accents confirmed, all 10 sections render in order, CTA routing is correct, and auth-conditional header works. Loading screen verified via source code (appears too briefly for browser capture).
